hero_tagline_am: ልዩ የትምህርት ዘዴዎቻቸውን ባገናዘበ መልኩ ወጣቶች ክህሎት ገንብተው፣ ድምፃቸውን ያሰሙበት መድረክ።
hero_tagline_en: We believe the unique learning styles of young people should be considered when planning and implementing skill development activities.
t1_quote_am: Ye'abinet ድምፄን ማሰማት እንዳችል አስተምሮኛል። አሁን ያሰብኩትን ለሌሎች ማካፈል አልፈራም።
t1_quote_en: Ye'abinet taught me that my voice matters. I'm no longer afraid to share what I think with others.
t2_quote_am: ፕሮጀክቱ ላይ ከሰራሁ በኋላ ትምህርት ቤት ውስጥ የቡድን አመራር ሃላፊነት ወሰድኩ።
t2_quote_en: After working on my project here, I took on a leadership role at school. The feedback I got here made all the difference.
t3_quote_am: ዲጂታል ክህሎቶቼን ያሳደጉ ሲሆን አሁን ለወደፊቴ የበለጠ ዝግጁ ነኝ።
t3_quote_en: The digital skills program opened my eyes to what I can build. I feel genuinely prepared for the future now.
